title: braya dentata
intro: Braya dentata, also known as the braya or braya toothwort, is a perennial plant species native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Braya dentata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
